eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Maricopa, AZ; at 12:42 PM on MAY 29, 2026 Effective until 8:42 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A SAFE Alert has been issued for (City, County or Tribal Entity). This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. (LEO name) is looking for (sex M; F; name of victim)) last seen on (on foot or driving). If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
